wire_begin_address.message0: Initialize I2C communication with slave address %1
wire_begin_address.tooltip: Initialize I2C communication at the specified address

wire_set_clock.message0: Set the I2C clock frequency to %1 kHz

wire_begin_transmission.tooltip: Starts a transfer to the specified device

wire_end_transmission.tooltip: End the transfer and send a stop signal if necessary

wire_end_transmission_result.message0: End transmission and return error code, stop? %1
wire_end_transmission_result.tooltip: End I2C transmission and return status code, 0 means success, 4 means unknown error

wire_write_bytes.message0: Write multiple bytes of data %1, length %2
wire_write_bytes.tooltip: Write a set of data bytes

wire_request_from.tooltip: Request a specified amount of data

wire_available.tooltip: Returns the amount of data available in the receive buffer

wire_peek.tooltip: Preview next I2C data without removing it

wire_on_receive.message0: Execute function %1 %2 when I2C receives data
wire_on_receive.tooltip: Set the I2C receive callback function

wire_on_request.message0: Execute function %1 %2 when I2C requests data

wire_set_timeout.message0: Set the I2C timeout to %1 milliseconds and reset the flag to %2
wire_set_timeout.tooltip: Set I2C timeout and reset behavior

wire_get_timeout_flag.tooltip: Get the current I2C timeout flag status
